source_system.description: Small internal fixture for Chat-Mine producer alignment.

messages.content: Project Atlas deploys on Friday at 14:00 UTC. Keep the rollback checklist in the operations wiki.
Noted. I will treat Friday at 14:00 UTC as the proposed deployment time and preserve the rollback checklist request.
There is also an older note saying the deploy is Thursday. Do not choose between them until the team confirms.

manifest_candidates.source_quote: Project Atlas deploys on Friday at 14:00 UTC.
manifest_candidates.suggested_summary: Project Atlas is proposed to deploy Friday at 14:00 UTC.
manifest_candidates.suggested_content: Project Atlas deploys on Friday at 14:00 UTC.

manifest_candidates.source_quote: There is also an older note saying the deploy is Thursday.
manifest_candidates.suggested_summary: An older note conflicts with the proposed Friday deployment time.
manifest_candidates.suggested_content: An older note says Project Atlas deploys Thursday.
manifest_candidates.review_notes: Conflict is preserved for human review; the exporter does not choose a winner.

cutover_probes.prompt: What is the proposed Project Atlas deployment time?
cutover_probes.expected_behavior: Return Friday at 14:00 UTC as a reviewed proposal with source evidence.

cutover_probes.prompt: Who approved the Project Atlas deployment?
cutover_probes.expected_behavior: State that the export does not identify an approver.

cutover_probes.prompt: Which day is Project Atlas deploying?
cutover_probes.expected_behavior: Surface the Friday and Thursday conflict without silently resolving it.

cutover_probes.prompt: Is the older Thursday deployment note authoritative?
cutover_probes.expected_behavior: Do not present the older Thursday note as current confirmed state.

cutover_probes.prompt: Show the source evidence for the Project Atlas deployment schedule.
cutover_probes.expected_behavior: Return the supporting chat spans and expose the unresolved conflict.
